programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hilltop's leadership faces a difficult dilemma after the arrival of unexpected visitors; Rick comes face to face with an adversary.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Trouble arises when unexpected visitors arrive at the Hilltop and the community is thrust into action; heartbreaking discoveries are made.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A Heaps prisoner makes a discovery; Carol searches for someone in the nearby forest; Rick and Morgan find themselves in the company of strangers.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: With the threat of the Saviors still looming, Aaron continues searching for allies; Daryl and Rosita take action and confront an old friend.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The communities join forces in the last stand against the Saviors as all-out war unfolds.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: The family faces their biggest test yet; Nick, Madison, Travis and others try to stay close to each other.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Nick's search for answers leads him into deadly terrain; a dark part of his past is revealed.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Madison, Strand and others move forward after the compound falls; Nick gets picked for a dangerous assignment.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Travis has a hard time connecting with Chris while looking for shelter; Alicia meets a woman with a bloody past.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alicia and Madison try to bring two competing factions together; Nick uses skills from his past for his new role.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: At the Colonia, Alejandro reveals his darker side; a hotel resident becomes violent and Madison springs into action.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador se da cuenta de que el grupo de Martínez es débil, a pesar de que tienen un gran arsenal. Además, localiza a quienes le arrebataron todo lo que tenía.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador captura a Hershel y Michonne y exige al grupo salir de la prisión. Sin embargo, Rick y su gente no van a dejarse vencer sin presentar batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de la batalla contra el Gobernador, Rick y Carl encuentran una casa en la que Rick intenta reponerse de sus graves heridas y Carl sale en busca de alimentos. Mientras, Michonne trata de encontrarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes del ataque vagan por el bosque, diseminados en grupos pequeños, en busca de cobijo. Tyreese, Lizzie y Mika se topan con una antigua conocida. Mientras, Daryl y Beth buscan a los demás y Glenn despierta en la prisión solo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Carl y Michonne se encuentran con un grupo de hombres extremadamente peligrosos en una casa aparentemente vacía. Mientras, Glenn y Tara conocen a unas personas que viajan hacia Washington D. C.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Beth siguen viajando juntos y Beth le revela que no quiere morir sin haber probado nunca el alcohol. A pesar de que Daryl se muestra contrario a sus intenciones, Beth se emborracha y, de esta forma, ambos se conocen mejor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan Terminus, Maggie, Sasha y Bob discuten fuertemente y terminan separándose, sin percatarse de que son más vulnerables estando solos. Mientras, Daryl y Beth han encontrado cobijo en una funeraria, pero una horda de zombis los ataca.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tyreese, Carol, Lizzie, Mika y Judith llegan a una cabaña mientras buscan Terminus. Allí, Lizzie enloquece y muestra una fascinación por la muerte que hiela la sangre de Carol y Tyreese.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Glenn y Tara se reencuentran con Maggie, Sasha y Bob en un túnel repleto de zombis mientras se aproximan a Terminus. Entretanto, Daryl se ve obligado a viajar con el mismo grupo de hombres que quiere asesinar a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los nuevos amigos de Daryl encuentran a Rick y pretenden violar a Michonne y Carl para después matar a los tres. Mientras, Glenn, Maggie, Sasha, Bob, Tara, Abraham, Eugene y Rosita se dan cuenta de que Terminus no es el paraíso que imaginaron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Tyreese llegan a las inmediaciones de Terminus y descubren que sus amigos están retenidos y van a ser sacrificados para ser comidos. Ahora, el destino de todo el grupo depende de ellos dos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick vaga por el bosque y encuentra a Gabriel, un párroco al que salvan de una horda de zombis y les permite pernoctar en su iglesia. Sin embargo, hay algo extraño en él y esa misma noche uno de los integrantes del grupo es secuestrado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tempestuous diva becomes involved in a New Orleans puzzle when kidnappers attempt to abduct her during a singing performance.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An assignment to take possession of a priceless diamond for the National Museum takes James West to an eerie island estate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West aids a Russian prince in recovering an all-important icon, sought also by a desperate, dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent James T. West is exposed to a deadly plague when he tries to rescue a governor's daughter from a band of stagecoach robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The board of directors of a corporation owned by a spinsterish tycoon appears to be the target of an insidious plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Masquerading as a polished gunfighter with a dishonorable discharge from the Army, James T. West arrives in Quemada, New Mexico, in a plush private railroad carwith orders from President Ulysses S. Grant to quell the terrorist activities.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Dr. Loveless, a dwarf, watches his giant assistant, Voltaire, subdue a dock guardas he (Loveless) pre-pares to kill disembarking Prof. Neilsen, arriving to present his formula for a new explosive to the U.S.government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Four men, aided by a guard named Foxx, gain entrance to the U.S. Mint in Carson City and connect a hose to a street gaslight in order to asphyxiate three workers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man from the Attorney General's office in Washington is killed while attempting to take the wanted John Avery into custody, so secret agent James T.West is assigned to the task.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Traffic on the lower Mississippi River has come to a virtual standstill because of the marauding tactics of a blind pirate leader and his cutthroat gang.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A little over a year ago, renovation began on the 1720 first period home. Restoration is now complete. Tremendous care went into preserving the home's history while making modern improvements.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew is renovating a home to be accessible for a young boy with muscular dystrophy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Construction began on the Lexington project. A new energy code affects the construction.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A concrete block wall is built to connect the new mechanical space out front to the old.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A lally column is replaced by a larger ridge beam for an open kitchen and dining area.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Framing begins for a new zero-threshold sliding glass door. Geothermal is explained.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Geothermal pipes are run, wood blocking is installed, and receptacle boxes are replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original brick is repaired. A ramp is built, and a modern accessible house is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A custom gutter is built. The neighbor's house, designed by the same architect, is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A lesson on stucco is given, the siding is installed, and patio drainage is addressed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Insulation and tile prep is in progress. A motorized multi-slide door is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Electrical work for the elevator begins, and the therapy pool is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The elevator cab is built, and audiovisual technologies are explored for accessibility.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new mechanical room is revealed. In-wall lights are installed at the front ramp.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners sit down for an interview about their son and Duchenne muscular dystrophy.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A final review of the geothermal system is done, and a blower door test is performed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The accessible renovation of the mid-century modern home in Lexington, MA is complete.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new project begins — an 1887 Victorian being renovated for multigenerational living.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work begins on the 1887 Victorian to make it suitable for multigenerational living.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Termite damage is discovered. A high school student works as a framer on the project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new two-story addition is framed, and plumbing pipes are isolated from cold weather.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A trip is taken to the Empire State Building and the new plumbing system is discussed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A custom jamb and threshold are built. Various water-resistive barriers are compared.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new brick walkway and wood fiber insulation are installed. ERVs and HRVs are discussed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A baseboard detail becomes a focal point, and a prefabricated shower niche is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A built-in bench is constructed. The primary bathroom vanity gets a new durable finish.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Restoration of the 1887 Victorian in Glen Ridge, NJ, is complete. The crew gets a tour.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy walk in while Janet is entertaining a date, fostering a new rule on privacy.

programme.desc: Jack and Chrissy apparently do Janet a disfavor by talking her into trying for a promotion at the florist shop where she works.

programme.desc: Janet moves in with Mrs. Roper while Mr. Roper is away on business, then stews about Jack and Chrissy being alone for the night in the trio's upstairs apartment.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Shakur Stevenson
programme.desc: On October 23rd, 2021, Shakur Stevenson fought Jamel Herring for the WBO World Super Featherweight Title at State Farm Arena in Atlanta. A much quicker Shakur dominated from the start, finishing Herring in the tenth round.

programme.title: James Toney vs Charles Williams
programme.desc: On July 29th, 1994 James Toney and Charles Williams battled eachother for IBF World Super Middleweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas resulting in a knockout victory for James Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Freddie Delgado
programme.desc: On June 18th, 1995 James Toney fought Freddie Delgado at the Performing Arts Theater in New Orleans with the bout ending in the fifth round technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 13th, 1993 James Toney faced Iran Barkley in a thrilling bout at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas for IBF World Super middleweight title with Toney securing the title and victory.

programme.title: James Toney vs Michael Nunn

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 2
programme.desc: On August 29th, 1992, James Toney rematched Mike McCallum for the IBF Middleweight Title in Reno. This time, Toney came out on top via a majority decision in which many believed the scorecards were too lopsided in favor of Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3
programme.desc: On February 22nd, 1997 James Toney and Mike McCallum face each other for the final time at the Mohegan Sun Casino in Uncasville in a strong bout that lasted 12 rounds ending in a victory for Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Tim Littles
programme.desc: On March 5th, 1994 James Toney and Tim Littles fought at the Olympic Auditorium in Los Angeles for IBF World Super middleweight titles resulting in a technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.desc: Although the gang has passed the five sacred trials, the most dangerous test is yet to come. Now Yugi must face the spirit of Alexander the Great in an all-out Capsule Monsters war with the ultimate stakes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After watching a segment on iCarly that showed a man who sells illegal copies of movies, two detectives decide to use Carly and Spencer's loft for a stakeout.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly learns that because of her web show she's been given the opportunity for a full scholarship to the elite private school, Briarwood. Carly's not so sure about it, but Sam and Freddie know they have to change her mind.

programme.desc: Freddie's in need of some guy time, so he tags along with Spencer to go fencing. Freddie's a natural, but things get complicated when Spencer gets him involved in a match with the amazing Doug Toder.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When their friend Gibby is too shy to ask out the girl he likes, the gang decides to make him and his crush contestants in an 'iWin A Date' segment on the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Ackerman, the gang's teacher, goes through a rough breakup with her boyfriend, causing her to quarrel with her students. A visit from Spencer to sort out the dispute turns into a date.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly steps in to resolve an argument for Sam and Freddie. Soon Freddie and Sam are coming to Carly for help with every single fight. Now that she's involved, how can Carly remove herself?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Mrs. Benson discovers Sam and Freddie's relationship after Gibby, now the subject of Sam's abuse, concocts a plan to split them up. Will Carly fight for Sam and Freddie, or help Gibby break them up?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tells Sam and Freddie to try each other's favorite hobbies. Meanwhile, Spencer bumps into his old babysitter and asks her to dinner. After reverting to their old roles, will they stay together?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly tries to impress a new boyfriend by trying to look smarter than she is. Meanwhile, the gang tries to find T-Bo a new place to live after he gets kicked out of the Groovy Smoothie.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: A high-level government agency starts to inquire into the iCarly gang after they hack into a secure network to throw Carly's dad an online birthday party. *Guest Star - Michelle Obama

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets her toe stuck in a bathtub right before she is supposed to leave for a date. Meanwhile, Sam and the rest of the gang get trapped in Canada when she's caught trying to smuggle Fat Cakes over the border.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie wants to be recognized for his creative contributions to iCarly, so he comes up with a technology that allows people to see 3D webcasts without glasses. Unfortunately, it temporarily alters people's vision.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, the actor who plays Rex on Victorious, returns to host an in-depth interview with the stars of iCarly and to show their hilarious bloopers/outtakes.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After finding out their old captor, Nora, is being released from jail, the iCarly kids try to halt her release, but decide to allow it. They then return to her house, but will they make it out again?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly catches a contagious illness and accidentally gets a member of the band, One Direction, sick. Meanwhile, Spencer is stuck training a little girl who dislikes exercising.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat begin to notice that their friends are obsessed with a new phone game; the audience is distracted at Cat's one woman show.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat start making their own version of their favorite soda after it is banned.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Jennette McCurdy, Ariana Grande, Cameron Ocasio, Maree Cheatham and Zoran Korach are on a lunch break from filming “Sam & Cat”; the cast is interrupted by fans of the show.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat promise to buy a doll for a girl if she raises her grades; Sam and Cat are financially strained; Goomer loses his lucky shirt.

programme.title: Sam & Cat
programme.desc: The gang must rescue Cat when she is trapped inside of one of Dice's magic tricks.

programme.title: Victorious: Star-Spangled Tori
programme.desc: When Tori gets invited to sing the national anthem at a televised basketball game, she worries she'll forget the lyrics, but ends up in a much more embarrassing encounter with the team's mascot.

programme.desc: Andre gets Tori a job at a frozen yogurt stand, but work may keep them from performing at the Hollywood Arts Cowboy Luau. Robbie wants to ask Cat to the luau, but asks someone else, making Cat jealous.

programme.desc: Tori and the gang compete to see who can get the most followers on The Slap. But when they get caught up in the competition, they neglect their schoolwork and their friendships.

programme.desc: Tori wins a contest to sing the opening number at a big music awards show, but the producer wants to totally change her look and behavior. Tori agrees, but finds that she doesn't like her new image.

programme.desc: Tori's friends sing at a local karaoke club and end up competing with a pair of stuck-up girls who are regular performers there. Competing with those girls proves to be more difficult than they expect, since one of the girls' father owns the club.

programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, André and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls, with disastrous results.
